intent.summary: Ship Rubrix v1.2.0 — Measurement-Based Lock Gates
intent.details: Replace user-fiat lock with measurement-gated lock. Add clarity-scorer agent (4-axis weighted scoring), .clarity schema field on rubric/matrix/plan, version-aware enforcement (only contract version >= 1.2 enforces clarity), rubrix score-clarity read-only CLI, rubrix lock --force audit path, PostToolUse deduction inline surface, and rubrix report Forced Locks section. v1.0/v1.1 contracts remain read-compatible.

criteria.description: cli/schemas/rubrix.schema.json gains $defs.Clarity (score, threshold, deductions[code,message,weight], scored_at, scorer_version, artifact_hash, forced + audit fields) referenced from rubric/matrix/plan as optional. Deduction code is enum {vague_description, missing_evidence, unmeasurable_floor, dangling_reference, uncovered_axis}. v1.0 (examples/self-eval, examples/ios-refactor) and v1.1 fixtures continue to validate clean; clarity.score>1, deductions.code outside enum, forced=true without forced_at+force_reason, and non-64-hex artifact_hash all fail validation.

cli/src/core/contract.ts exports Clarity, ClarityDeduction, ClarityDeductionCode, and ArtifactKey types; rubric/matrix/plan TypeScript interfaces gain optional clarity?: Clarity. Existing v1.0/v1.1 type assignability for fixtures (no clarity) preserved.
criteria.verify: tsc --noEmit (transitively via vitest tsx loader) + manual review

criteria.description: cli/src/core/version.ts provides parseVersion, compareVersions, isAtLeast, and isV12Plus(c). isV12Plus returns true for '1.2.0' and '1.5.0', false for '0.1.0' (current dogfood baseline) and '1.1.99'. Invalid version strings yield isV12Plus=false (no throw at the boundary).
criteria.verify: vitest cli/tests/clarity-threshold.test.ts (covers via resolveClarityThreshold) + targeted module-level tests in PR #2 if needed

criteria.description: resolveClarityThreshold(c, key, opts) returns base{rubric:0.75,matrix:0.80,plan:0.70} adjusted by max-modifier across all 5 axes (deep=+0.10, standard=0, light=-0.10). Override (CLI flag) takes precedence over axis_depth, clamped to [0,1]. RUBRIX_SKIP_BRIEF=1 and uncalibrated brief fall back to standard. ambition=demo forces all-light.

rubrix score-clarity <key> <path> emits a JSON object {artifact, artifact_hash, threshold, threshold_policy_version, scorer_version, score:null, deductions:[], scored_at, note} on stdout. Exit codes: 0 success, 2 invalid key/contract, 3 artifact missing in contract. Crucially: rubrix.json byte content is unchanged after the command runs (read-only contract).
criteria.verify: vitest cli/tests/score-clarity.test.ts (7 tests, including byte-equivalence on rubrix.json)

criteria.description: Two consecutive `score-clarity rubric <path>` invocations on the same input emit the same artifact_hash (SHA-256 over canonical, sorted-keys JSON of the artifact body, with any pre-existing clarity stripped). Threshold reflects --threshold override and axis_depth.

rubrix validate on a v1.2 contract (version >= 1.2.0) at state ∈ {RubricLocked, MatrixDrafted, MatrixLocked, PlanDrafted, PlanLocked, Scoring, Passed, Failed} fails with a v1.2-specific error if any locked artifact is missing clarity, or if clarity.score < clarity.threshold and clarity.forced!==true. forced=true with forced_at + force_reason validates as an audited bypass.

(codex review P2 follow-up) The v1.2 clarity invariant is enforced uniformly across every code path that trusts locks: rubrix validate, rubrix gate (refuses to evaluate when invariant is breached, exit 2), PreToolUse hook (blocks code-edits and /rubrix:score on a v1.2 contract missing clarity, while still allowing edits to rubrix.json itself so users can fix it), and UserPromptExpansion. Logic lives in cli/src/core/clarity-gate.ts (checkClarityInvariants + firstClarityViolation) and is consumed by validate.ts, gate.ts, and hooks/handlers.ts.

examples/self-eval/rubrix.json (v1.0, version='0.1.0', no brief) and examples/ios-refactor/rubrix.json (v1.0, no brief) continue to validate, gate, and report unchanged. v1.1 fixtures (version='0.1.0' + intent.brief) at PlanLocked also remain valid without clarity. The 173-test baseline is fully preserved.

cli/src/cli.ts registers `score-clarity <key> <path>` with --threshold (numeric) and --json flags via commander; non-numeric --threshold throws at parse time; the command is reachable via `node cli/bin/rubrix.js score-clarity rubric ./rubrix.json`.
criteria.verify: manual: node cli/bin/rubrix.js score-clarity rubric ./rubrix.json (exit 0 + JSON on stdout)

criteria.description: All 203 vitest tests pass (173 baseline preserved + 30 new across clarity-schema, clarity-threshold, score-clarity, integration/clarity-version-gate). No skipped or pending tests introduced. CLI, schema, and AJV validator caches behave correctly under repeated invocations.
